description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic design with a metallic, ribbed double-barrel configuration, each barrel encased in a silvery finish and supported by copper-toned structural elements. The body is predominantly a reddish-brown metal with turquoise accent lines running along the frame, giving it a high-tech appearance. The grip is ergonomic, with a pistol-style handle that appears reinforced and partially wrapped in a darker material for improved hold. The top of the shotgun includes a raised sight or scope mount, and the trigger area is protected by a rounded, robust trigger guard. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal alloys and synthetic materials, with visible fasteners and joints indicating modular assembly. The shotgun's compact form and stylized details make it suitable for close-quarters urban scenarios.
description: A compact, double-barreled shotgun with a futuristic metallic design, copper accents, and turquoise highlights. It features an ergonomic pistol grip and a robust, rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: This view highlights the double-barrel configuration, copper-toned frame, and turquoise accent lines along the body, with the pistol grip and trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the twin barrels and the reinforced grip are prominent, showing the shotgun's compactness and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_2: A side profile reveals the full length of the barrels, the ergonomic handle, and the raised sight or scope mount on top.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the front ends of the barrels, the robust trigger guard, and the structural details of the grip and frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with ribbed metallic finish
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, robust, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced structure
